title: elaeocarpus batjanicus
intro: Elaeocarpus batjanicus, also known as the Batjanella tree, is a species of flowering plant in the Elaeocarpaceae family native to Papua, Indonesia. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus batjanicus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections, among others. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
